description_long: This is a vintage-style convertible car with a striking blue and gold color scheme, featuring pronounced fenders and a long, rectangular hood. The car has two brown leather seats and a visible steering wheel on the right side, suggesting a right-hand drive configuration. A machine gun is mounted on the passenger side of the hood, giving the vehicle a unique, possibly militaristic or gangster-era appearance. The rear of the car includes a large, boxy trunk with a textured pattern, and the interior appears to be spacious for a two-seater. The wheels are mostly concealed by the large fenders, and the car's bodywork is characterized by smooth, rounded lines. The overall design evokes early 20th-century luxury convertibles, blending elegance with a touch of ruggedness.
description: A vintage blue and gold convertible car with brown leather seats, a right-hand drive, and a mounted machine gun on the hood, featuring large fenders and a boxy rear trunk.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide blue fenders, gold trim, round headlights, and the grille, with the machine gun visible on the right side of the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the long hood, mounted machine gun, single door, and the brown leather seats with the trunk at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large, patterned trunk, the back of the seats, and the broad rear fenders.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the steering wheel, dashboard, and the full length of the car, including the mounted machine gun and trunk.
